prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to england and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document applies to England as it concerns the regulatory judgement of Fairhive Homes Limited, a registered provider of social housing operating in England, specifically in Buckinghamshire, Oxfordshire, and South Northamptonshire. The regulatory framework and standards mentioned are relevant to social housing providers within England.
